title: Firecrawl Docs Auditor Request
description: Safe-to-store input for one goal-directed documentation audit. Runtime credentials are intentionally excluded.

docs_url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS documentation entry point.

integration_goal.description: Specific developer task the agent should be able to perform using the docs.

mode.description: live allows later slices to call Firecrawl; cached uses local fixture data.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to inspect. The first demo should default to 20.

max_depth.description: Maximum link depth from the entry URL. The first demo should default to 1.

allowed_hosts.description: Host allowlist for later fetch logic. This is a safety boundary, not a crawler expansion mechanism.

cache_key.description: Local fixture key used when mode is cached.
